summary: This is a brief logistical announcement reminding readers about a Joel on Software community dinner meetup in Bellevue, Washington. The post provides the time and location for the event at Crossroads Mall's food court. It contains no substantive technical or editorial content.
key_points: This is a simple event reminder with no analytical content
Joel on Software community dinners were a recurring series of informal meetups with readers
key_insight: This is a logistical announcement with no substantive insight to extract.
